# Frame Roofing Utah
> Utah's trusted roofing and restoration contractor serving 40+ Wasatch Front communities.

## About
Frame Roofing Utah is a licensed and insured roofing contractor based in Heber City, UT. We specialize in residential roofing, commercial roofing, storm damage restoration, water and fire restoration, solar installation, and general contracting across the entire Wasatch Front.

## Services
- Residential Roofing: https://www.frameroofingutah.com/pages/residential-roofing
- Commercial Roofing: https://www.frameroofingutah.com/pages/commercial-roofing
- Storm Damage Restoration: https://www.frameroofingutah.com/pages/storm-damage-restoration

- Salt Lake City, UT: https://www.frameroofingutah.com/locations/salt-lake-city
- West Jordan, UT: https://www.frameroofingutah.com/locations/west-jordan

- Sandy, UT: https://www.frameroofingutah.com/locations/sandy
- Orem, UT: https://www.frameroofingutah.com/locations/orem
- Layton, UT: https://www.frameroofingutah.com/locations/layton

- Park City, UT: https://www.frameroofingutah.com/locations/park-city
- Bountiful, UT: https://www.frameroofingutah.com/locations/bountiful

## Blog & Guides
- [Roof Replacement Cost in Utah 2026](https://frameroofingutah.com/blog/utah/roof-replacement-cost-utah-2026): Complete cost guide with material, labor, and elevation factors
- [How to Choose a Roofer in Utah](https://frameroofingutah.com/blog/utah/how-to-choose-a-roofer-utah): 9-step guide with DOPL verification, insurance, and red flags
- [10 Signs You Need a New Roof in Utah](https://frameroofingutah.com/blog/utah/signs-you-need-new-roof-utah): Warning signs checklist — age, curling, granule loss, sagging, and more
- [Utah Hail Season Roof Guide 2026](https://frameroofingutah.com/blog/utah/utah-hail-season-roof-guide-2026): Hail season timing, damage identification, insurance claims process, and prevention
- [Utah Roof Insurance Claims Guide 2026](https://frameroofingutah.com/blog/utah/utah-roof-insurance-claims-guide): Step-by-step insurance claim filing process, adjuster preparation, supplemental claims
- [Best Roofing Materials for Utah](https://frameroofingutah.com/blog/utah/best-roofing-materials-utah): Material comparison for Utah climate — asphalt, metal, tile, synthetic shake
- [Utah Roof Maintenance Checklist](https://frameroofingutah.com/blog/utah/utah-roof-maintenance-checklist): Season-by-season maintenance guide for Utah homeowners
- [How Long Does a Roof Last in Utah](https://frameroofingutah.com/blog/utah/how-long-does-roof-last-utah): Real-world lifespans by material type, valley vs. mountain differences
- [Utah Roof Ventilation Guide](https://frameroofingutah.com/blog/utah/utah-roof-ventilation-guide): Ridge vents, soffit vents, ice dam prevention, energy efficiency
- [Emergency Roof Repair in Utah](https://frameroofingutah.com/blog/utah/emergency-roof-repair-utah): Emergency response steps, tarping, insurance, scam avoidance

- Licensed: Utah DOPL #14256097-5501
- Rating: 5.0 stars (Google Business Profile)
- Address: 142 S Main St, Heber City, UT 84032
- Phone: 435-292-8802
- Coverage: 80km radius from Heber City covering Salt Lake Valley and Wasatch Front
- Hours: Monday-Saturday 8AM-6PM
- Certifications: CertainTeed, Tamko certified installer
